title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 21 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 21 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 21 2025
summary:
Main
On October 21, the closing price of the 01 contract was 769.5 yuan/mt, up 0.13% from the previous trading day. Spot cargoes at ports showed rela velysmall fluctua ons compared to the previous day, with transac on prices for PB fines in the Hebei region ranging between 784-784 yuan/mt, up 2 yuan/mt from yesterday; transac on prices for PB fines in the Shandong region ranged from 772-778 yuan/mt, up -1 to 2 yuan/mt from yesterday. Spot transac ons were rela vely low today, as low prices weakened traders' willingness to sell, resul ng in a generally subdued trading atmosphere.
